channel.title: SevenAtSevenSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Golden again! U.S. tops Canada to win 1st men's hockey gold since 'Miracle on Ice'
item.description: The U.S. won its first Olympic gold in 46 years in a 2-1 overtime thriller over rival Canada. A brilliant performance by U.S. goaltender Connor Helleb...

item.title: Mexican army kills leader of Jalisco New Generation Cartel, official says
item.description: The Mexican army killed the leader of the powerful Jalisco New Generation Cartel, Nemesio Rubén Oseguera Cervantes, "El Mencho," in an operation Sunda...

item.title: University students hold new protests in Iran around memorials for those killed
item.description: Iran's state news agency said students protested at five universities in the capital, Tehran, and one in the city of Mashhad on Sunday.

item.title: Ukraine's combat amputees cling to hope as a weapon of war
item.description: Along with a growing number of war-wounded amputees, Mykhailo Varvarych and Iryna Botvynska are navigating an altered destiny after Varvarych lost bot...

item.title: Pakistan claims to have killed at least 70 militants in strikes along Afghan border
item.description: Pakistan's military killed at least 70 militants in strikes along the border with Afghanistan early Sunday, the deputy interior minister said.

item.title: Quantonation’s double-sized second fund shows quantum still has believers
item.description: Quantonation Ventures, a venture firm investing in quantum and physics-based startups, has closed its oversubscribed second fund at €220 million, or a...

item.title: Trump says Netflix will face ‘consequences’ if it doesn’t fire board member Susan Rice
item.description: Netflix board member Susan Rice had predicted that corporations that “take a knee” to Trump will be “held accountable” when Democrats return to power.

item.title: China’s brain-computer interface industry is racing ahead
item.description: China’s brain-computer interface industry is rapidly scaling from research to commercialization, driven by strong policy support, expanding clinical t...

item.title: TSA says PreCheck still operational after previous announcement of suspension during funding fight
Blizzard warnings cascade across East Coast with winter storm’s approach
6 days left to lock in the lowest TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 rates
item.description: Super Early Bird pricing for TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 ends February 27 at 11:59 p.m. PT. That means you have just 6 days left to secure up to $680 of t...

item.title: TechCrunch Mobility: Waymo makes its defense
item.description: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility — your central hub for news and insights on the future of transportation.

item.title: Armed man shot and killed after entering secure perimeter of Mar-a-Lago, Secret Service says
item.description: Trump was not there but was at the White House in Washington.

item.title: The Biggest Homebuyer Discounts in Over 12 Years | Feb. 2026 Update
item.description: Homebuyers are getting the biggest discounts on properties in over 12 years—and it’s only getting started. At this point, nobody can refute that a ful...

item.title: Should I Use My Home Equity to Buy My Next Rental Property? (Rookie Reply)
item.description: Should you use your home equity to buy a rental property? Whether it’s your primary residence or another investment property, this strategy could help...

item.title: America’s Most Underwater Housing Markets Present a Golden Opportunity For Investors
item.description: The combination of foreclosures and falling housing prices is like throwing chum into the water for a group of hungry sharks eager for deals. In some ...

item.title: Off by Nearly 1 MILLION Jobs? Why New Jobs Report Will Impact Rentals
item.description: Big economic news dropped last week: labor data, inflation rates, and huge jobs revisions. All of these are already impacting the housing market, but ...

item.title: How the Wealthiest Have Programmed Their Portfolios This Year
item.description: Despite stock markets hovering around record highs, investors are feeling jittery. You can see it in consumer confidence collapsing to its lowest leve...
